prompt:
Create a modern studio fashion collage using the uploaded person as the exact face reference. Design a dynamic multi-frame poster with 5 different poses of the same person arranged inside rounded-rectangle panels overlapping on a vibrant cyan-to-blue gradient background. The central figure sits confidently on a blue cube, wearing an oversized royal-blue vintage hockey jersey with bold red-and-white typography, light-wash baggy jeans, chunky white sneakers, clear eyeglasses, and a silver dog-tag necklace. Surrounding frames show varied candid poses: adjusting glasses, crossed arms close-up, crouching with a smile, relaxed crouch pose, and a cropped sneaker-focused shot.

Professional commercial photography, symmetrical layout, clean graphic design, subtle distressed print texture, soft studio lighting, ultra-sharp details, realistic skin texture, fashion editorial aesthetic, magazine cover quality, vibrant colors, premium streetwear campaign, depth and layering, high-end poster design, 8K resolution, photorealistic, perfectly matched identity across all frames, Instagram trend style, contemporary Gen-Z fashion branding.
